globalHeaders.Permissions-Policy: accelerometer=(), camera=(), geolocation=(), gyroscope=(), magnetometer=(), microphone=(), payment=(), usb=()
globalHeaders.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; style-src 'self' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src https://fonts.gstatic.com data:; img-src 'self' data: https: blob:; connect-src 'self'; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'none'
